compiled_state.title: As a developer, review-protocol logic lives in a workflow document that skills can execute inline
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Extract review-protocol's multi-perspective review logic into REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md and convert the review-protocol skill into a thin wrapper that reads and executes the workflow document.
**Why**: Implementation-plan needs to execute the review protocol inline (reading the workflow doc) to avoid a 3-level skill nesting chain (sprint → implementation-plan → review-protocol) that triggers a Claude Code control-return bug. The thin wrapper preserves direct /dso:review-protocol invocation for skills that call it at nesting depth ≤ 2.
**Scope**:
- IN: Create plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md containing the full review logic (reviewer dispatch, score aggregation, conflict detection, revision cycles); update review-protocol skill to be a thin wrapper that reads and executes the workflow doc (same pattern as /dso:review wrapping REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md)
- OUT: Changes to implementation-plan or sprint (Story 5), sub-agent guard blocks (Stories 1-2)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md exists at plugins/dso/docs/workflows/ and contains the complete multi-perspective review protocol (reviewer dispatch, score aggregation, conflict detection, revision cycles)
  <- Satisfies: "Review-protocol logic is extracted into REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md"
- When this story is complete, the review-protocol skill is a thin wrapper that reads and executes REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md, producing identical behavior to the current skill
  <- Satisfies: "the review-protocol skill becomes a thin wrapper that reads and executes it"
- When this story is complete, all existing callers of /dso:review-protocol (brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan, roadmap, design-review, retro) see no behavior change
  <- Satisfies: "No existing orchestrator workflow breaks"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Single source of truth — the workflow doc is authoritative; the skill just reads it
- [Testing] Verify existing review-protocol tests still pass after the refactor
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: review-protocol logic extracted to REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md, SKILL.md is thin delegation stub.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
